_comment: Poker Engine: Home Game Edition - House Rules Configuration
_documentation: See docs/00_architecture_overview.md for full configuration reference.

null_rules._comment_nulls_match: If true, two Null cards form a pair. Default false per table consensus.
null_rules._comment_wilds_null: If true, a wild card may declare itself as a Null of any suit.
null_rules._comment_null_orbs: If true, a Null of Orbs is included when both Nulls and Orbs are active.

deck._comment_warning: Emit low card warning when deck has fewer than this many cards remaining.

evaluation._comment_royal: If true, Royal Flush outranks other Straight Flushes for pot purposes.
evaluation._comment_sample: Monte Carlo sample size for hand frequency calculation.

declare._comment_scoop: If true, declaring Both Ways requires winning both directions or player receives nothing.

guts._comment_burn: Maximum cumulative cascade payment per player per session in dollars.
guts._comment_hand_size: Number of cards dealt per player. Your group has played up to 10.

poulet._comment_win: Number of tricks required to win the hand.
poulet._comment_tricks: Total tricks played per hand. Equals cards dealt per player.
poulet._comment_burn: Maximum cumulative zero-trick penalty per player per session in dollars.
poulet._comment_all_fold: If true, pot carries when all players fold before trick play.
poulet._comment_single: If true, last remaining player after declarations wins automatically.

chips._comment_chips: Label used in UI and ledger. Purely cosmetic.

betting._comment_betting: Default bet amounts. Variants may override these.

night_baseball._comment_wilds: Ranks that are wild in Baseball variants. 3s and 9s by default.
night_baseball._comment_extra: Rank that grants an extra card. 4s by default.
night_baseball._comment_pass: Amount paid to pass in Night Baseball without beating current high hand.

elevator._comment_diagonals: If true, diagonal floor selections are pre-enabled. Dealer may override per hand.

anaconda._comment_pass: Cards passed left in each successive pass round.

auction._comment_auction: First card down, 5 auctioned face-up, last card down.

bot._comment_count: Number of bot opponents at the table.
bot._comment_aggression: Base aggression level 0.0 to 1.0. Each bot varies slightly from this.
bot._comment_variance: Random variance applied to each bot personality parameters.
bot._comment_delay: Simulated thinking delay in milliseconds. Makes bot feel more natural.
bot._comment_monte_carlo: If true, use Tier 2 Monte Carlo bot instead of Tier 1 rule-based.
bot._comment_claude: If true, use Tier 3 Claude API bot. Falls back to Tier 1 on timeout.
bot._comment_reasoning: If true, display Claude API bot reasoning in UI when available.

dirty_bitch._comment: Queen of Spades triggers redeal. Dealer enables per hand.
dirty_bitch._comment_pre: Before any betting: redeal and re-ante on top of existing pot.
dirty_bitch._comment_post: After betting has occurred: redeal, pot carries.

follow_the_queen._comment: Queen face-up changes wild rank to next card dealt. Dealer enables per hand.

high_low_declare._comment: Adds high-low chip declare at showdown. Applicable to any poker variant.

modifiers._comment_stacking: If true, multiple modifiers may fire on the same card event. Default false.
modifiers._comment_poulet: Modifiers are not applied to Poulet. See Architecture Overview v1.3.

variants._comment: Remove a variant name to disable it from the dealer selection screen.

session._comment_player: Set automatically at session start. Used for local single-player mode.
session._comment_advance: If true, bot turns resolve automatically without player confirmation.

ui._comment_hint: If true, show partial hand evaluation above player cards during play.
ui._comment_reasoning: If true, show Claude API bot reasoning when available.
ui._comment_notification: How long modifier fired notifications display before auto-dismissing.
ui._comment_sound: Phase 7 feature. No-op until sound effects are implemented.
